title: Curiosity Blog, Sols 4900-4907: Pasadena, We Have a Drill Sample!

title: NASA Uses Mineralogical Marker to Understand Ancient Martian Climate
summary: Scientists analyzed 20 Martian samples collected by NASA’s Curiosity Rover and found that differences in hematite crystallite size at varying elevations could serve as a new mineralogical marker for understanding Mars’ ancient climate.

title: NASA Astronaut Andrew Morgan Retires
summary: May 28, 2026 After a 12-year career at NASA, U.S. Army Brig. Gen. Andrew R. Morgan has retired from the agency to continue his military service.
